overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark, multi-level cyberpunk parking garage from Cyberpunk 2077. The player ascends concrete stairs and navigates neon-lit corridors overlooking a vast central shaft.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete emergency stairwell with metal railings

events.description: ascending the concrete stairs from ground level toward upper floors
reaching the top landing of the stairwell, approaching the exit door

agents.ego_description: climbing the dimly lit concrete stairs, gripping the metal handrail while moving upward

entered.detail: brutalist concrete stairwell with gray walls and steps
white painted metal handrail along the left side of the stairs
dim emergency lighting visible at the top of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a stark concrete stairwell. The player ascends the stairs, moving from the ground floor toward level 3, with only minimal emergency lighting illuminating the gray concrete walls and metal handrails.

scene_state.functional_zone: level 3 parking deck with neon accent lighting

events.description: exiting the stairwell into the open parking garage level 3
transitioning from dim stairwell to cyan and red neon-lit parking deck

agents.ego_description: walking along the parking deck, observing the multi-level atrium and glass elevator shaft

entered.detail: large white painted number 3 on the concrete wall indicating the floor level
long cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling edges
glass-walled elevator shaft with green interior lighting visible through the atrium
open vertical space revealing multiple parking levels above and below

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell onto level 3, the scene opens into a vast cyberpunk parking garage illuminated by cyan and red neon strips. The player walks along the deck, passing the level 3 sign and approaching a railing that reveals a dizzying multi-level atrium with a glass elevator shaft.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with observation windows overlooking the garage

events.description: entering a dark corridor from the lit parking deck
passing windows that reveal the neon-lit atrium outside the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit corridor, briefly glancing at the parking garage visible through the windows

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the service corridor with minimal lighting
large rectangular windows looking out into the parking garage atrium

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark service corridor that runs alongside the parking garage. Through observation windows, the neon glow of the atrium is visible, contrasting with the dim interior of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: central atrium overlook with vertical shaft view

events.description: exiting the dark corridor back into the open parking deck area
approaching the railing and looking down the deep central shaft of the parking structure

agents.ego_description: walking to the edge of the deck and looking down the multi-story central shaft, observing the vertical column and lower levels

entered.detail: deep vertical shaft dropping through all levels of the parking garage
tall industrial column with rust and orange lighting running down the center of the shaft
multiple illuminated parking decks visible below, receding into the distance

segments.scene_description: Returning to the open deck, the player approaches the railing and gazes down the vast central shaft of the parking garage. The view reveals a dizzying vertical drop through multiple illuminated levels, centered around a massive rusty industrial column with orange lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic concrete stairwell into the expansive, neon-lit depths of a cyberpunk parking garage. It begins with a steady ascent up gray stairs under dim emergency lighting, moving upward until the camera exits the stairwell onto level 3. The scene then opens into a vast deck illuminated by cyan and red neon strips, where the camera passes a level sign and approaches a railing overlooking a dizzying multi-level atrium and glass elevator shaft. As the camera shifts into a dark service corridor, the vibrant glow of the atrium is glimpsed through observation windows before the view returns to the open deck. Finally, the camera leans over the railing to gaze down the massive central shaft, revealing a vertical drop through multiple illuminated levels centered around a rusty industrial column bathed in orange light.
